plugins.name: recoup-skills
plugins.description: The open skills library — portable music-industry skills (artist management, songwriting, analytics, release campaigns, setup) you can drop into any agent. Also installable directly via `npx skills add recoupable/skills`.

interface.shortDescription: Music industry skills for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Teach your coding agent how to manage artists, write songs, analyze music analytics, plan releases, and more. General skills work for anyone — platform skills integrate with the Recoupable platform.

plugins.name: recoup-essentials
plugins.description: Get onto the Recoup platform: first-run setup, API key issuance, sandbox scaffolding, artist creation and enrichment, artist workspace conventions, and direct Recoup API + connector access.

interface.shortDescription: Setup, API access, and artist onboarding for the Recoup platform
interface.longDescription: The starting-point plugin for Recoupable. Bundles the skills an agent needs to get onto the platform and stay productive: first-run setup and API key issuance, sandbox scaffolding, artist creation and enrichment, artist workspace file conventions, and direct Recoup API + connector access.

plugins.name: recoup-research
plugins.description: Music industry research: artist analytics, audience insights, playlist intelligence, competitive analysis, trend detection, and outreach — powered by Recoup's research API.

interface.shortDescription: Music industry research — artist analytics, audience insights, playlist intelligence, and more
interface.longDescription: Full-stack music industry research for AI agents. Run artist research sweeps, discover emerging talent, find playlist pitch targets, compare competitive positions, and draft outreach — all powered by Recoup's research API with 30+ endpoints covering Chartmetric data, web intelligence, and people search.

plugins.name: recoup-deals
plugins.description: Music catalog deals: data-room ingestion, royalty normalization, rights checks, and valuation analysis for buy-side, seller-prep, financing, and post-close.

interface.shortDescription: Music catalog deals: royalties, rights, valuation, and deal materials for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Turn messy catalog data rooms into source-cited deal packages with normalized royalty data, rights exceptions, valuation workpapers, and buyer, seller, or lender-ready memos.

plugins.name: recoup-content
plugins.description: Recoup content workflows: skills and commands for AI agents to draft, edit, and publish content for artists across Recoup's surfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, edit, and publish artist content for Recoup
interface.longDescription: A content workflows plugin for Recoup. Bundles skills and commands that help AI agents draft, edit, and publish content for artists across Recoup's surfaces — captions, blurbs, release copy, social posts, and more.

plugins.name: recoup-song-analysis
plugins.description: Song audio analysis: turn a track's audio into catalog metadata, lyrics, playlist pitches, sync briefs, and mix feedback using Recoup's audio language model (Music Flamingo).

interface.shortDescription: Turn a song's audio into metadata, lyrics, playlist pitches, sync briefs, and mix feedback
interface.longDescription: Song audio analysis for AI agents. Point it at a public audio URL and get structured catalog metadata, transcribed lyrics, DSP playlist pitches, music-supervisor sync briefs, and technical mix feedback — powered by Recoup's audio language model (Music Flamingo).

plugins.name: recoup-releases
plugins.description: The Recoup release workflow — one command takes an artist + release from creative brief through dated campaign, master doc, playlist targeting, and post-release monitoring, building a single release workspace.

interface.shortDescription: One command takes a release from brief to post-release monitoring.
interface.longDescription: The flagship release workflow bundle for Recoup. One command takes an artist + release from creative brief through a dated campaign, master release doc, playlist targeting, and post-release monitoring — building a single release workspace. Requires the Recoup REST API.
